title: What one early morning changes
caption:
One hour before everyone else. That's the whole move.

Not because productivity is the goal — but because what you do in the first quiet moments of the day reveals who's actually governing your life. If you reach for the phone first, the day is already running you before you've said a word to God.

Win the first decision. Feed the right thing first. Move your body before you feel like it. Plan before the noise starts.

None of this is a system. It's a set of small choices that compound over years into a man who is useful, grounded, and hard to knock over.

"Guard your heart, for everything you do flows from it." — Proverbs 4:23

Save this for Monday morning.

—

Comment "morning" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.

#faith #discipline #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #disciplineequalsfreedom #masculinity #thework #earlymorning #christianity
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
